data.title: AI development sees traces replacing code as the main documentation source, transforming debugging and testing processes. Find out more.
data.description: In the field of AI systems, traces are taking the place of code as the main source of documentation, leading to changes in debugging, testing, and collaboration processes. Discover how this transition is influencing the development of AI. Explore further for insights.

data.title: VanEck predicts Bitcoin to potentially reach $53.4 million by 2050 with CAGR of 29%, foreseeing a surge in adoption.
data.description: VanEck, a global asset manager, has forecasted a potential surge in Bitcoin's price, estimating it could reach as high as $53.4 million by 2050. The firm's optimistic outlook suggests a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 29% for Bitcoin over the next 25 years. This "hyper-Bitcoinization" scenario envisions Bitcoin gaining a substantial market share in both domestic and international trades. If Bitcoin were to capture 20% of international trade and 10% of domestic GDP, the value per coin could potentially hit $53.4 million. This forecast highlights the potential for significant growth in Bitcoin's value in the coming decades.

data.title: BTC longs are dumped by Bitfinex whales as $135K price target is back. Whales signal bullishness by reducing BTC long positions after a year of market exposure decline.
data.description: Large holders of Bitcoin, known as whales, have started showing a positive signal in the market by decreasing their long positions in BTC. This move comes after a continuous decrease in their overall market exposure over the past year.

data.title: Aloe Blacc rebuilds after Altadena fire with modular home post 9,400 structures destroyed in Eaton fire, a year ago.
data.description: A year following the devastating Eaton Fire that razed over 9,400 structures in Altadena, a long-term resident's decision has drawn attention to a quicker route to secure housing. The resident's choice focuses on LiveLarge Home's factory-built method, which aims to provide permanent housing solutions efficiently. This highlights the potential for a speedier recovery for those affected by the wildfires in Altadena.
